panel.description: Aizawa Azusa, a corporate drone who died of exhaustion from overwork in her previous life, is reincarnated in another world, where she decides to live out a slow and uneventful life forever. But then, 300 years later, she discovers that the experience she earned by defeating slimes every day just to keep up her easy lifestyle has brought her to level 99 and made her the strongest in the world. The rumors begin to spread, and soon trouble comes knocking...

episode_metadata.season_title: I've Been Killing Slimes For 300 Years And Maxed Out My Level (English Dub)
episode_metadata.series_title: I've Been Killing Slimes For 300 Years And Maxed Out My Level

panel.title: I Maxed Out My Level

panel.description: Natsuki Subaru is summoned to a parallel world on his way home from the convenience store. He's entranced at first by the fantasy world suddenly stretching before his eyes, but the cute girl he believes summoned him is nowhere to be found, and soon enough he's utterly lost. Then a gang of punks surrounds him, but he quickly learns that he doesn't have any of the powers that he thought all...
panel.title: The End of the Beginning and the Beginning of the End
A Beautiful Act of Treason! The Spy, Stussy!
panel.description: Stussy suddenly knocked out Lucci to the Straw Hats’ surprise, and when Shaka reveals her true identity, they’re stunned again. Meanwhile, a major incident occurs on an island called Sphinx where Whitebeard came from.

panel.title: Escape
panel.description: Shiroe, Naotsugu, and Akatsuki reach the northern city of Susukino, and safely meet Serara.  With the help of the mysterious swashbuckler Nyanta, they plot to leave Susukino.  But the evil guild Brigantia wants to stop them.  The high-level monk Demikas attacks them.  Can they overcome the odds?

Serara, a young female member of the guild "Crescent Moon Alliance", is trapped by mysterious men in the northern city of Susukino and needs help.  Shiroe and his friends travel to reach her.  Annoyed by the game's tasteless food, they travel northwards, and go inside "the depths of Palm", a crumbling series of old mining tunnels.  There they meet creepy monsters...
panel.title: The Depths of Palm
Ryo Returns Home
panel.description: Ryo's otherworldly water magic clashes against the furious flames of the Inferno Magician.

panel.title: The Inferno Magician
panel.description: As Princess Fiona and her brother come under attack, the Inferno Magician rushes to their rescue.

panel.title: The Open Port Festival
panel.description: Ryo and his roommates travel to the coastal town of Whitnash for a job.

panel.title: The Inferno Magician
panel.description: As Princess Fiona and her brother come under attack, the Inferno Magician rushes to their rescue.

panel.title: Unprecedented
panel.description: Ryo comes to Abel's rescue in the depths of the dungeon, facing off against mysterious enemies.
As Abel escorts a team of academics through the dungeon, a strange warp puts them all in danger.
panel.title: Beyond the Gate

panel.description: As Abel escorts a team of academics through the dungeon, a strange warp puts them all in danger.
panel.title: Beyond the Gate
The Great Tidal Bore
panel.description: Ryo looks for ways to prepare for another akuma encounter, while trouble is brewing in the dungeon.
As Ryo settles into life as an adventurer, he has an unexpected encounter with a menacing foe.
panel.title: Eclipses & Akuma
The Town of Lune
panel.description: Abel is welcomed back in the town of Lune and Ryo gets acquainted with civilization.
Hidden within the massive bridge spanning the Great Canyon Tor is a secret story of Himmel and Gehen.
panel.title: A Beautiful Sight

panel.description: When Frieren's party cannot afford the fare to cross Lake Korridor, the captain proposes a trade.
panel.title: Himmel’s Memoirs

panel.description: The Divine Revolte appears at the village, while Frieren, Fern, and Methode battle Solide and Hemmung.
panel.title: A Magnificent End
The Divine Revolte
panel.description: Frieren, Fern, and Methode enter the woods to look for the four-armed Divine Revolte.
A village on the Northern Plateau is wiped out, and the victims' distinctive wounds point to a certain demon.
panel.title: A Demon-Slaying Request

panel.description: Frieren is reunited with Fass the dwarf, who has been searching for the Boshaft liquor for over 200 years.
panel.title: Logistics in the Northern Plateau
Other People's Homes
panel.description: Stark only asked Fern out as a joke, but the two end up going on a date.
Frieren’s party dream of hot springs as they reach Etwas, but the village is abandoned.
panel.title: Somewhere She'd Like
The Hero of the South
panel.description: In a village in the northern lands, Frieren’s party are hired to polish a statue of a hero.
Frieren, Fern, and Stark leave the magic city of Äußerst behind and travel along a road in the northern lands.
panel.title: Shall We Go, Then?

panel.description: The Seraphim come following CP-0 to the Labophase, pitting Zoro and Brook against the seven of them. Sanji, Franky, Edison, and Lilith leave the lab to fight them, but the Seraphim launch a full-scale attack on the lab.
panel.title: A Desperate Situation! The Seraphim's All-out Attack!
Turn Back My Father! Bonney's Futile Wish!
panel.description: CP-0 enters the Labophase and starts attacking the Thousand Sunny as soon as they find it. Luffy reunites with Nami and the others but finds out that Vegapunk is missing. Meanwhile, Bonney is pressing Vegapunk to change back her father Kuma.

Vegapunk asks the Straw Hats to take him on board their ship which makes Franky and Usopp happy but annoys Nami. Lucci orders his troops to block off all Vegapunk’s escape routes and looks to invade the heavily-secured Labophase.
panel.title: Sinister Schemes! The Operation to Escape Egghead

panel.description: Vegapunk describes how he managed to grant the Seraphim Devil Fruit powers, which surprises Franky and the others. Meanwhile, Luffy is still facing Lucci in his savage, awakened form, but the rocket to the Labophase is about to leave.
panel.title: The Strongest Form of Humanity! The Seraphim's Powers!
The Log of the Rivalry! The Straw Hats vs. Cipher Pol
panel.description: Robin and Franky look back on the history of Lucci, Kaku, and the rest of the Cipher Pol agents who forced their way into Egghead. They talk about how the rivalry between the Straw Hats and those Cipher Pol agents evolved since they met in Water Seven.

Luffy transforms into the Warrior of Liberation as Rob Lucci also shows his awakened Devil Fruit form. As the two clash, Vegapunk reveals the shocking truth of the Gum-Gum Fruit and his eye-opening theory on Devil Fruits.
panel.title: Powers on a Different Level! Luffy vs. Lucci!

panel.description: CP-0 led by Rob Lucci makes a forced landing at Egghead and people on the Fabriophase are plunged into confusion while Shaka and the others prepare to fight back on the Labophase. The enraged Atlas stands up to defend the peace of the island.
panel.title: Preparations for Interception! Rob Lucci Strikes!

panel.description: Vegapunk reveals the shocking history of the ancient giant robot and asks Luffy to take him off Egghead. Rob Lucci and his fellow Cipher Pol agents arrive at the island and ask for permission to enter the port.
panel.title: The Eccentric Dream of a Genius!

panel.description: Shaka reveals the secret behind the foundation of the Revolutionary Army and how the relationship between Vegapunk and Dragon affected it. Meanwhile, Vegapunk explains to Luffy and the others about his special power and how his clones work.
panel.title: The Will of Ohara! The Inherited Research
A Forbidden Piece of History! A Theory Concerning a Kingdom
panel.description: Vegapunk Shaka shares with Robin and the others his theory about an ancient kingdom and the 100-Year Void. He even says that he visited Ohara after its destruction. Meanwhile, Luffy and Chopper try to activate the giant robot and something surprising happens.

Nami and the others are attacked by a Pacifista who resembles Jimbei and while they’re in battle, some of Vegapunk’s Satellites look on with excitement. Meanwhile, Luffy and the others find something extraordinary at the scrap heap.
panel.title: The Brain of a Genius - Six Vegapunks!

panel.description: The Straw Hats without Luffy, Chopper, and Jimbei are taken to the laboratory on the clouds far above the ground by Lilith. They get excited about the things they've never seen before. However, inside the laboratory, a new threat is waiting for them.
panel.title: The Mystery Deepens! Egghead Labophase
The Winner Takes All! Law vs. Blackbeard!
panel.description: The Blackbeard Pirates ambushed the Heart Pirates led by Law. The Blackbeard Pirates’ top officers use a variety of formidable Devil Fruit powers and keep pushing the Heart Pirates in order to obtain the copies of the Road Ponegliffs.

Chopper and Bepo look back on Trafalgar Law’s life. They explain how he met Luffy, formed an alliance, and traveled to Punk Hazard, Dressrosa, and the Land of Wano to take down the Emperors of the Sea.
panel.title: A Project to Fully Enjoy! 'Surgeon of Death' Trafalgar Law

panel.description: While Luffy and the others are enjoying the futuristic machines of Egghead, someone who resembles Bartholomew Kuma comes after them. When Luffy tries to fight back, Bonney stops him and reveals her shocking relationship with Kuma.
panel.title: Bonney's Lamentation! Darkness Lurking on the Future Island
Brimming with the Future! An Adventure on the Island of Science!
panel.description: A young girl who came out of the big robot names herself Dr. Vegapunk and it surprises Franky and the rest of the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Luffy’s group gets to the surface of the island where futuristic buildings stand and unknown giant creatures wander about.

panel.title: A New Island! Future Island Egghead
panel.description: Luffy and Chopper fall into the rough cold sea along with the mysterious girl. Jimbei tries to help them but another attack comes from the unknown creature. Meanwhile, the Sunny is hit by torpedoes and the rest of the Straw Hats are thrown into the sea, too.
The Perseus lands in the Americas. They first head to Northern California in search of yellow dent corn, but discover a lot more than that.
panel.title: Light Trap in the Darkness
SCIENCE JOURNEY
panel.description: Maintaining morale will be critical on the long journey to the Americas. Knowing where on the ocean you are is pretty important, too. The crew of the Perseus discuss.
Senku and his companions finally set off for America in search of corn. However, a dispute arises between Ryusui and Senku shortly after they depart
panel.title: RYUSUI VS. SENKU

panel.description: With the petrification device in the Kingdom's hands, it's time to revive Tsukasa. But there's just one problem: the device is out of batteries.
panel.title: BEYOND THE NEW WORLD

panel.description: To the moon! That's the plan, at least. Senku and the Kingdom of Science need to devise a means with which to go to the moon and deal with Why-Man. The first step is allying with the people of Treasure Island and enlisting their help with some new crafts.
panel.title: Treasure Island
FIRST DREAM
panel.description: Senku stands victorious. He then works on reviving the others and fixing their communications device, but while they are talking with Ruri they encounter a strong interference with the signal.
Much to Ibara's shock and dismay, Senku devised a plan and managed to escape petrification. Now the two enter into a head-to-head battle for control of the Medusa device.
panel.title: LAST MAN STANDING
Flicker of Doom
panel.description: Yo and the Kingdom of Science capture the petrification device, but Ibara isn't going down without a fight.

panel.title: JOKER
panel.description: The Kingdom of Science members launch an attack on the islanders aboard the Perseus, but Moz isn't far behind and Senku and the others are forced to retreat inside the vessel. Ibara has them cornered, but Senku unleashes his Joker card.

panel.title: Total War
panel.description: The Kingdom of Science attacks and tries to execute their plan to steal the petrification device. Moz convinces Kirisame to use the device, but Ryusui's instincts tell him something is off about the situation.
Moz and the Kingdom of Science form a tenuous, temporary alliance against Ibara. How long it will last is a question they can't afford to concern themselves with just yet.
panel.title: Battle in Three Dimensions

panel.description: More of the Kingdom of Science is brought back from petrification, but they are discovered in the cave by Moz.
panel.title: Deal Game, Test of Wit
The Medusa's True Face
panel.description: The team revives Kaseki to work on the drone. Meanwhile, Ginro is called to see the Master.

panel.title: The Kingdom of Science's Counterattack
panel.description: Kohaku is forced to destroy Ryusui's statue to prove that she isn't a spy.
Kohaku has located the treasure left behind by Byakuya and the others, but it's encased in concrete. Senku has to devise a plan to quietly get at the contents inside, so as to not alert the guards.
panel.title: With This Fist, A Miracle

panel.description: Amaryllis, Ginro and Kohaku are chosen to join the inner palace. The science team will need a way to communicate with them in secret, and, eventually, a way for them with the science team.
panel.title: SCIENCE WARS

panel.description: Suika and Ginro work together to rescue the mobile lab from the Perseus. Reunited with Senku and the others, the group works on items to help Kohaku with the selection process.
panel.title: Beautiful Science
The Trump Card Aboard the Science Vessel
panel.description: Amaryllis explains how she evaded petrification and how she came to her decision to sneak into the inner palace.

panel.title: Ray of Despair, Ray of Hope
panel.description: The Perseus arrives at the treasure island. A recon squad consisting of Senku, Soyuz, Kohaku, and Gen set off to locate the platinum and make contact with the islanders. Ukyo later discovers something on the seafloor and send Ginro to investigate.
The Perseus crew are on their way to the treasure island, the birthplace of the Hundred Tales, where they hope to locate the treasure box left behind by the Soyuz crew.
panel.title: TREASURE BOX

panel.description: Kaseki's efforts to build the science vessel Perseus hit a roadblock when he realizes that it's impossible to get all the parts to fit in practice.
panel.title: Science Vessel Perseus

panel.description: The morse code signal reading "WHY" saturates the airwaves too much for Ukyo to pinpoint a direction, so the Kingdom of Science works on a way to visualize the signal.
panel.title: Eyes of Science

panel.description: Senku brings along a team to look for the Sagara Oil Fields. Meanwhile, Suika and Francois go truffle hunting.
panel.title: First Contact
Greed Equals Justice
panel.description: The Kingdom of Science will need rations to last them through their voyage to the other side of the world. But Senku, being no professional, burns all the bread he attempts to bake.

While continuing to use the hot air balloon to search for the oil, it's decided that Ishigami Village needs to take up agriculture to prevent future food shortages, as well as to produce preserved food for their upcoming sea voyage.
panel.title: NEW WORLD MAP

panel.description: After defeating Tsukasa’s empire, the Kingdom of Science sets its sights on crossing the ocean to uncover the source of humanity’s petrification. To captain their journey, they revive Ryusui Nanami, a brilliant but greedy sailor who’s thrilled by the chance to claim everything in this new world. Before commanding the vessel through restless seas, they must first secure the king of fuels: oil.
panel.title: Ryusui
PROLOGUE OF Dr. STONE
panel.description: Tsukasa and Senku defeat Hyoga, but Tsukasa is mortally wounded. The options for treating sepsis and a punctured lung are limited, painful and uncertain.

panel.title: Humanity's Strongest Tag Team
panel.description: A truce is called between the kingdom of science and Tsukasa Empire. All appears to be well, but some of the kingdom's dynamite is missing.

Several of the kingdom's strongest fighters are locked in battle with Hyoga and Tsukasa. Meanwhile, Senku, Gen and Chrome make it to the miracle cave. They'll have very little time to put together a weapon to end the war.
panel.title: To Destroy and to Save

panel.description: The kingdom of science begins its siege on Tsukasa's empire. They'll have less than twenty seconds from the beginning of the war to scare the empire into submission, or risk casualties.
panel.title: FINAL BATTLE
Secret Mission
panel.description: Chrome makes it back to the kingdom of science's base, where he bears witness to the Steam Gorilla for the first time. Meanwhile, with the help of the others and with his fake Lilian voice, Gen manages to convert even more people away from the Tsukasa Empire.
Chrome tries to use his knowledge of science to escape from his prison, but he just doesn't have the tools. Yo, a former cop who had been revived into Tsukasa's army, tries to work up the ranks.
panel.title: Prison Break
STEAM GORILLA
panel.description: The kingdom of science builds a steam engine. They use it to set up base closer to Tsukasa's empire.

Nikki becomes the first member of the Tsukasa Empire to convert to the kingdom of science. Meanwhile, with Chrome in mortal danger, Senku and the kingdom begin plotting a way to bring him back to safety.
panel.title: Full Assault
Call from the Dead
panel.description: With Homura captured, the kingdom of science finally succeeds in setting up a hotline with their spies in Tsukasa's empire. Meanwhile, Chrome runs into some trouble.
The kingdom of science moves to Tsukasa's scout, Homura, so that they can deploy their newly built cell phone in their base.
panel.title: HOT LINE
STONE WARS BEGINNING
panel.description: Senku and the kingdom are going to need rations to be well during their attack on Tsukasa's empire. There's a science for that.

panel.title: Voices Over Infinite Distance
panel.description: Senku and the kingdom learns of a mysterious disc left behind by his father and the other astronauts. They use their newfound technology to bring it to life.
Now that the kingdom of science has access to tungsten, they can finish building the cell phone.
panel.title: Wave of Science
The Treasure
panel.description: Senku, Magma and Chrome explores a cave for tungsten, which they'll need to make durable filaments for their cell phone vacuum tubes. But Magma has other plans in mind.
Making cell phones takes a lot of materials and tools. Senku begins by upgrading their equipment using the waterwheel Chrome and Kaseki invented and built together.
panel.title: Spartan Crafts Club
The Age of Energy
panel.description: Tsukasa plans a second attack after a few months of preparation. He has no idea what Senku and his kingdom are cooking up in the meantime.

panel.title: To Modernity
panel.description: Tsukasa's army attacks the village. Outmatched by the attackers, they have to rely on wits, cooperation and science to fend them off.

panel.title: Stone Wars
panel.description: Tsukasa's army attacks the village, potentially leaving them with no choice but to cut down the bridge and lose Kinro.

panel.title: A Hundred Nights and a Thousand Skies
panel.description: Through Byakuya's message to Senku, we learn of the events that started Ishigami Village.

Having won the Grand Bout fair and square, and having cured village priestess Ruri of her pneumonia, Senku has won the hearts and minds of the village. Ruri delivers Senku a message from someone dear.
panel.title: A Tale for the Ages

panel.description: With Magma defeated, it's down to Senku and Ginro to take the throne. Although both are on the same team, one is driven by personal greed and opportunism. The fight is on!
panel.title: The Culmination of Two Million Years
Master of Flame
panel.description: The Grand Bout is on. The kingdom of science must defeat Magma and take the seat of the village chief in order to give Ruri the antibiotic and win over the village.

All that's needed to make antibiotics is alcohol. The best way to get some is to win the Grand Bout, which the Senku and his kingdom will also need to do in order to keep Magma away from Ruri and give her the drug.
panel.title: Masked Warrior

panel.description: To make antibiotics, Senku and his kingdom need to obtain sulfuric acid from a fountain of the stuff. The team goes prepared, but there's no guarantee that they'll make it back alive.
panel.title: Buddies Back to Back

panel.description: The development of glassworks, an important step for making sulfa drugs and for chemistry as a whole, turns out to have a surprising benefit for Suika.
panel.title: Clear World

panel.description: Senku and his kingdom of science successfully test the first lightbulb since the collapse. Meanwhile, Asagiri Gen, a spy from Tsukasa's empire, is killed by an unknown attacker.
panel.title: A Flimsy Alliance

panel.description: Senku starts a ramen stand in hopes of winning over support for his kingdom of science, but some people are too principled to take such a bribe. Mentalist Asagiri Gen is not one of them.
panel.title: Let There Be the Light of Science
Stone Road
panel.description: Kohaku's sister, village priestess Ruri, is gravely ill. Senku, Chrome and Kohaku begin their quest to make antibiotics to save her life.
Kohaku shows Senku to her village, but it's going to take some convincing before they let him in. In the meantime, he makes friends with a like-minded, promising "sorcerer."
panel.title: Where Two Million Years Have Gone

panel.description: Taiju and Yuzuriha figure out Senku's secret to reviving him. But now that he's back, they need to deal with Tsukasa.
panel.title: Two Nations of the Stone World
Ocean
panel.description: Goku and his companions arrive at the mystic Second Demon World where a giant ocean spreads as far as the eye can see! The party is amazed at the new world but is immediately attacked by Gendarmerie that have been sent by Gomah!

panel.title: Thieves
panel.description: Rumors of what Goku did in the Third Demon World spread across the Demon Realm. To avoid trouble, Goku wears a disguise at the hotel, but they can't let their guard down in the Third Demon World. Thieves see through his disguise!
